wiki.summary: Uploaded in March 2024, BUTCHER VANITY is the debut single from the vocal synthesizer focused music circle FLAVOR FOLEY and was featured on their first album, CARDIAC CONTREPOINT. Despite the masculine tone that appears throughout the song, the vocals were solely made with Synthesizer V's Yi Xi (奕夕) and tuned by ricedeity. The song has reached many big milestones, becoming the most viewed English song using Synthesizer V, most viewed song using Yi Xi, and receiving 1 million views within 2 months of its release. Read more on Last.fm.
wiki.content: Uploaded in March 2024, BUTCHER VANITY is the debut single from the vocal synthesizer focused music circle FLAVOR FOLEY and was featured on their first album, CARDIAC CONTREPOINT. Despite the masculine tone that appears throughout the song, the vocals were solely made with Synthesizer V's Yi Xi (奕夕) and tuned by ricedeity. The song has reached many big milestones, becoming the most viewed English song using Synthesizer V, most viewed song using Yi Xi, and receiving 1 million views within 2 months of its release. Along with tuning, ricedeity was also responsible for creating the music video, character design for Yi Xi, and art for the cover of the single. The art in the music video contains multiple references to other media such as MILGRAM, Dungeon Meshi, Saturn Devouring His Son, and others. Despite Jamie Paige saying that the song took 3 days to make, the song itself was written and finished in a single day, with the music video taking the other 2 days of that time. BUTCHER VANITY is often wrongfully credited to Vane Lily alone due to the YouTube video being uploaded on Vane's channel and the first streaming uploads crediting Vane as the main artist. The song can be found on streaming under FLAVOR FOLEY's name by searching for the CARDIAC CONTREPOINT version of the track. Read more on Last.fm.
